{{Item
| image = Baker hat.png
| id = baker_hat
| type = Customization
| Subtype = Dyeable
| stackable = 64
| Description = Hot Dachshbuns comin' up!
}}

Baker's Hat is a dyeable equipable item that stylizes your dog.
[[File:Baker hat display.png|alt=2023-08-01_18 51 47|none|thumb|693x693px|Display provided by @Archon]]
==Obtaining==
===Crafting===
{| class="wikitable"
|-
!Ingredients
!Recipe
|-
|Any Wool
+ Leather Cap
|[[File:Baker hat crafting.png]]
|}
''Requires Bread to unlock the recipe.''

==Usage==
{{Accessory_use}}
==Trivia==
*It was introduced to DTN 1.17.2.
*The item's description is a sneak peek for an upcoming DTN skin - a Pokemon.
